decision.reason: Risk is high because weather and congestion are stacking on the active route. Southern Relief is better because it lowers route risk and protects ETA.

alert.headline: Predictive disruption alert
alert.message: Risk detected on Surat, Gujarat, India to Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India. Switch to Southern Relief now. Potential delay: 3h 14m. Tap to approve.

explanation.title: Predicted disruption needs action
explanation.summary: Your shipment may be delayed due to heavy rainfall risk detected along the route and congestion. Switching to Southern Relief can reduce the delay risk and protect the delivery window by about 3h 14m.
explanation.cause: Combined signal: Heavy rainfall risk detected along the route with rising traffic pressure.
reasoning: Risk is 50% because bad weather and congestion are building together.
Southern Relief is safer because it has lower route risk and better ETA protection.
Priya should approve the route change now to avoid a later delay.
